Joonho
Projects Blog About

06. Data Cleaning for Tensorflow

08 January 2021 - 4 mins read time
Tags: Tensorflow 101

Source: Coding Everyday

  1. Check Feature Type
  • data.dtype
  1. Change Feature to Categroical
  • data[‘column’].astype(‘category’)
  1. Change Feature to Integer
  • data[‘column’].astype(‘int’)
  • data[‘column’].astype(‘float’)
  1. Change NA(None)
  • Check NA: data.isna().sum()
  • Fill NA: data[‘column’].fillna(num)
import pandas as pd

url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blackdew/tensorflow1/master/csv/iris2.csv"
data = pd.read_csv(url)
data.head()
꽃잎길이 꽃잎폭 꽃받침길이 꽃받침폭 품종
0 5.1 3.5 1.4 0.2 0
1 4.9 3.0 1.4 0.2 0
2 4.7 3.2 1.3 0.2 0
3 4.6 3.1 1.5 0.2 0
4 5.0 3.6 1.4 0.2 0 
# one-hot encoding
encoding = pd.get_dummies(data)
encoding.head()
# since 품종 is int type, we cannot do one-hot encoding
꽃잎길이 꽃잎폭 꽃받침길이 꽃받침폭 품종
0 5.1 3.5 1.4 0.2 0
1 4.9 3.0 1.4 0.2 0
2 4.7 3.2 1.3 0.2 0
3 4.6 3.1 1.5 0.2 0
4 5.0 3.6 1.4 0.2 0 
# Check features type
data.dtypes

꽃잎길이     float64
꽃잎폭      float64
꽃받침길이    float64
꽃받침폭     float64
품종         int64
dtype: object

# Change features to Category
data['품종'] = data['품종'].astype('category')
data.dtypes

꽃잎길이      float64
꽃잎폭       float64
꽃받침길이     float64
꽃받침폭      float64
품종       category
dtype: object

# one-hot encoding
encoding = pd.get_dummies(data)
encoding.head()
꽃잎길이 꽃잎폭 꽃받침길이 꽃받침폭 품종_0 품종_1 품종_2
0 5.1 3.5 1.4 0.2 1 0 0
1 4.9 3.0 1.4 0.2 1 0 0
2 4.7 3.2 1.3 0.2 1 0 0
3 4.6 3.1 1.5 0.2 1 0 0
4 5.0 3.6 1.4 0.2 1 0 0 
# Check NA
data.isna().sum()

꽃잎길이     0
꽃잎폭      1
꽃받침길이    0
꽃받침폭     0
품종       0
dtype: int64

data.tail()
꽃잎길이 꽃잎폭 꽃받침길이 꽃받침폭 품종
145 6.7 3.0 5.2 2.3 2
146 6.3 2.5 5.0 1.9 2
147 6.5 3.0 5.2 2.0 2
148 6.2 3.4 5.4 2.3 2
149 5.9 NaN 5.1 1.8 2 
# Fill NA using 꽃잎폭's mean value
mean = data['꽃잎폭'].mean()
data['꽃잎폭'] = data['꽃잎폭'].fillna(mean)
data.tail()
꽃잎길이 꽃잎폭 꽃받침길이 꽃받침폭 품종
145 6.7 3.000000 5.2 2.3 2
146 6.3 2.500000 5.0 1.9 2
147 6.5 3.000000 5.2 2.0 2
148 6.2 3.400000 5.4 2.3 2
149 5.9 3.054362 5.1 1.8 2
with by Mark Joonho Lee
theme portfolYOU
